Mtn For Order On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony Giles, Esq., of Law Office of Anthony Giles (415-839-2099) for Jason Moment, Petitioner and moving Party.
Paul Lahaderne, Esq., of Sedgwick, LLP (415-781-7900) for 3130 Pacific, LLC, A Dissolved California Limited Liability Company, Respondent and Opposing Party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS JASON MOMENT and JESSICA MOMENT's Motion For Order On Petition To Confirm Arb Award is GRANTED. Opposition failed to show that arbitrator exceeded her powers within the meaning of CCP 1286.2(d) and Ahdout v. Hekmatjah (2013) 213 Cal.App.4th 21. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Mars Goodman, Not reported. (D501)

Mtn For Order On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS JASON MOMENT and JESSICA MOMENT'S Motion For Order On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to September 18, 2013, to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property dispute cases. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
